code: import axios from"axios";const API=axios.create({baseURL:"http://localhost:5000/api"});API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});export const applyLeave=data=>API.post("/leave/apply",data);export const getMyLeaves=()=>API.get("/leave/my-leaves");export const getAllLeaves=()=>API.get("/leave");export const approveLeave=function(id){let remarks=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:"";return API.put("/leave/".concat(id,"/approve"),{remarks});};export const rejectLeave=function(id){let remarks=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:"";return API.put("/leave/".concat(id,"/reject"),{remarks});};
